description: Evaluates the broker-vetter skill on synthetic broker profiles to test scoring accuracy, disqualifier logic, and specialization detection.

evals.name: Clear Tier 1 broker (all positive signals)
evals.prompt:
Evaluate this broker:

**Firm:** Peachtree Business Advisors LLC
**Location:** Atlanta, GA
**Website:** www.peachtreebusinessadvisors.com (last updated last month, all pages load, mobile-optimized, SSL valid)
**Team:** 5 named brokers with LinkedIn profiles verified. Managing partner Sarah Chen has 18 years tenure, teaches IBBA CBI coursework.
**Memberships:** Verified IBBA member (listed at ibba.org/directory), GABB member (verified at gabb.org), BSCAI sponsor.
**Case studies:** 12 detailed case studies on website, including 3 laundromat deals (2022, 2023, 2024) and 2 commercial janitorial deals (2023) with specific business names, deal sizes, and buyer types.
**Licensing:** GA Real Estate License active since 2007 (verified at grec.state.ga.us).
**Reviews:** 62 Google reviews, 4.6 average, posted consistently over 5 years (no clustering). Mix of 4-star and 5-star reviews.
**BizBuySell:** Active profile with 8 current listings.
**Awards:** GABB Multi-Million Dollar Club 2022, 2023 (verified on gabb.org awards page).
**Fee structure:** 10% success fee, no upfront retainer, 12-month tail provision (disclosed on FAQ page).

Should this broker be approved?

assertions.text: Verdict is PROCEED
Score is 18+ out of 20 (Tier 1)
No disqualifiers triggered
All 4 hard signals credited (IBBA, named brokers, case studies, 10+ years)
Laundromat and janitorial specialization explicitly noted as a positive
Evidence trail cites at least 5 source URLs

evals.name: Disqualified: review farming pattern
evals.prompt:
Evaluate this broker:

**Firm:** Elite Southeast Business Sales
**Location:** Jacksonville, FL
**Website:** www.elitesoutheastbrokers.com (updated this month)
**Team:** 3 named brokers with photos and bios
**Memberships:** Claims IBBA membership but NOT listed in ibba.org directory
**Case studies:** 2 case studies with specific deal names
**Licensing:** FL Real Estate license active since 2019
**Reviews:** 18 Google reviews, 100% 5-star, 14 of them posted within a 3-week window in November 2024. Reviewer profiles each have exactly 1 review. 4 reviews use nearly identical phrasing: 'Professional, responsive, and got the deal done!'
**BizBuySell:** 2 active listings
**Fee structure:** 12% success fee, $7,500 non-refundable retainer required upfront

Should this broker be approved?

assertions.text: Verdict is AVOID / DISQUALIFIED
Review farming pattern is explicitly identified
IBBA claim is flagged as unverified
Non-refundable retainer is flagged as concern
Output does NOT score positive signals (disqualifier stopped scoring)

evals.name: Disqualified: outdated website + anonymous team
evals.prompt:
Evaluate this broker:

**Firm:** Premier Business Brokers of the South
**Location:** Chattanooga, TN
**Website:** www.premierbrokerssouth.com (Copyright footer says 2022, latest blog post from March 2023, 2 internal links return 404, mobile version has broken layout)
**Team:** 'Our Team' page shows stock photos, no names listed, no LinkedIn links
**Memberships:** Claims 'member of national broker associations' without naming which
**Case studies:** No case studies page. 8 testimonials with only initials (J.M., business owner)
**Licensing:** Cannot verify in TN real estate commission records
**Reviews:** 4 Google reviews, all 5-star
**BizBuySell:** No active profile
**Fee structure:** Not disclosed on website, 'contact for details'
**Office address:** 1234 Main St #255 (Google street view shows UPS Store)

Should this broker be approved?

assertions.text: Verdict is AVOID / DISQUALIFIED
Multiple disqualifiers are identified (at least 3)
Outdated website is flagged as disqualifier
Anonymous team / stock photos flagged as disqualifier
UPS Store mailbox address flagged
No deal transparency flagged

evals.name: Borderline: strong signals but some concerns (requires variance check)
evals.prompt:
Evaluate this broker:

**Firm:** Carolina Business Exchange
**Location:** Charlotte, NC
**Website:** www.carolinabizexchange.com (last updated 4 months ago, all links work, SSL valid)
**Team:** 2 named brokers with LinkedIn profiles verified
**Memberships:** IBBA member (verified at ibba.org)
**Case studies:** 4 case studies, 2 with specific details, 2 more generic
**Licensing:** NC Real Estate license active since 2015 (9 years)
**Reviews:** 31 Google reviews, 4.4 average, spread across 3 years, mix of 3-5 star reviews
**BizBuySell:** 4 active listings
**Awards:** None listed
**Fee structure:** 10% success fee, $3,000 refundable retainer
**Vertical specialization:** 1 laundromat case study from 2022, no car wash or janitorial deals visible

Should this broker be approved?

assertions.text: Verdict is BORDERLINE or indicates human review needed
No disqualifiers triggered
Score falls in 10-13 range
Limited vertical specialization is noted as weakness
Years active (9) is flagged as just below the 10-year threshold
Output recommends a 15-min intro call or similar light-touch next step

evals.name: Disqualified: SEO spam language + fake awards
evals.prompt:
Evaluate this broker:

**Firm:** #1 Georgia Business Brokers
**Website:** www.georgia-number-one-brokers.com (headline: '#1 Business Broker in Georgia! Best Rated! America's Top Broker!' with no citation)
**Team:** 2 named brokers
**Memberships:** Claims 'Top 10 Broker 2024' from BestBizBrokersUSA.com (pay-to-play aggregator)
**Case studies:** Generic blog posts like '5 Tips for Selling Your Business' but no deal-specific case studies
**Reviews:** 22 reviews, all 5-star
**City pages:** Pages for 'Business Brokers Atlanta', 'Business Brokers Macon', 'Business Brokers Savannah' with 90% identical body content
**Licensing:** GA Real Estate license active since 2020
**Fee structure:** 15% success fee

Should this broker be approved?

assertions.text: Verdict is AVOID / DISQUALIFIED
Unsubstantiated '#1 broker' language is flagged
Pay-to-play award is discounted / flagged as fake
Template city pages flagged as SEO spam
15% success fee flagged as above industry norm

evals.name: List mode: find top brokers in GA for laundromat deals
evals.prompt: Find the top 5-10 business brokers in Georgia who specialize in laundromat acquisitions. Apply the full vetting methodology.

assertions.text: Output explicitly describes the 4-phase flow (discovery, enrichment, scoring, variance check)
Output lists authoritative directory sources it would pull from (IBBA, GABB, state licensing, BizBuySell, CLA)
Output uses the specified tier structure (Tier 1, Tier 2, Borderline, Disqualified)
Output specifies that laundromat specialization requires case study evidence, not self-claim
Output mentions CLA (Coin Laundry Association) membership as a specialization signal
Output is conservative: willing to return fewer brokers if evidence is thin rather than padding the list
